title: Namakkal district registers 197.80 mm rainfall after heavy downpour
summary: Namakkal district registered a cumulative 197.80 mm rainfall after heavy showers on Thursday evening. Paramathi Velur logged the highest at 57 mm, followed by Mohanur (46 mm) and Kumarapalayam (36 mm).

title: Namakkal Result 2026: TVK's C.S. Dileep wins assembly seat
summary: TVK's C.S. Dileep has won the Namakkal assembly constituency in 2026 in a tight contest, edging out AIADMK's Sridevi Mohan who had led in early counting.

title: One killed, two injured in scaffolding collapse in Namakkal
summary: One construction worker was killed and two others injured after a scaffolding structure collapsed at a building site in Namakkal town. A safety probe has been ordered.

title: DMK alliance wiped out in Salem and Namakkal districts
summary: The DMK-led alliance has been wiped out across Salem and Namakkal districts in the 2026 elections, with TVK and AIADMK sweeping nearly every constituency between them.

title: DEO and Collector inspect second phase of poll-officials training
summary: The District Election Officer and Collector inspected the second phase of training for polling station officials covering Namakkal, Sendamangalam and Rasipuram assembly constituencies.

title: Tiruchengode and Senthamangalam record sharp rain spells
summary: Tiruchengode logged 16.4 mm and Senthamangalam 17.4 mm of rainfall in Namakkal district, while Erumapatti registered 15 mm and Kollihills Semmedu logged 5 mm.
